blended.narrative: Red Lodge Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 4.4 inches of dry powder expected. Snow levels around 3,903 ft. Looking ahead, 15 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 4" of snow, highs of 22°F. Expect powder.
Saturday: 4" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 4" of snow, highs of 23°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: 6.4" of new snow over the past week. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 27".
